channel.title: Devin de Araujo
channel.description: Recent content on Devin de Araujo

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Devin — an ML engineer interested in how models actually work under the hood.

This blog is where I write up paper implementations, break down model architectures, and share notes on things I’m thinking about. The goal is to go deeper than the abstract: every post that covers a paper also links to a full working implementation on GitHub.

You can reach me on LinkedIn.
